title: SCP-5542 | Cake By The Ocean
description: A coast where digging underground reveals edible cake for approximately 2.5 meters.
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_dd1efd9e-5296-46be-a1c3-ee668dcdeecc.png) *** **Cake By The Ocean** mod adds __one biome__ _(SCP-5542),_ __three new items__ (_Cake piece, documentation, label),_ __one block__ _(CakeByTheOcean block)_, __one advancement__ _(discover SCP-5542 biome) and_ __one structure__ to the game. The mod is heavily inspired by **SCP-5542** from the **SCP Foundation Universe**. **SCP-5542** is a coast where digging underground reveals edible cake for approximately 2.5 meters. **●** **Mod** __made by__ : TheCaptainFoxy (me) ● __Mod created with__ MCreator ● Join __my discord__ for __support/question/suggestions/sneak-peaks__ and more! _TCF Discord_   __FAQ__ 
Spoiler

 ► Where can I find the mod content?

All of the mod’s content can be found in the SCP-5542 biome.

You can find it using /locate command.

 

► Where does the structure spawn?

The structure spawns only in the SCP-5542 biome at surface level, with approximately one structure per biome.

 

You can find it using /locate command

 

► How can I place the documents?

Right-click to read the documents.  
Shift + right-click to place them.

  *** ![SCP-5542 Label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12af4c35a8f429fd0dee42212ec1fa3b00e95255_0.webp) *** ![SCP-5542](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7502ab052e7634310d1306181cb8551bcd48880_0.webp)

SCP-5542 | Cake By The Ocean

*** **SCP-5542** is a **coast** where digging underground reveals **edible cake** for **approximately 2.5 meters.** Upon entering the biome for the first time, the **“Discovered”** advancement will be completed, rewarding the player with the **SCP-5542 document** and its label. Digging one block beneath the **SCP-5542 sand** will reveal edible cake. ***   __Show all content__  
Spoiler

 

Cake By The Ocean Block

The “Cake By The Ocean” block is the cake block found beneath the sand in the SCP-5542 biome.

Right-clicking the block will consume a portion of the cake, causing it to gradually shrink.

Eating the cake restores 1 of hunger (half a drumstick). The block can be eaten 16 times before it is fully consumed.

Breaking the cake block will drop shapeless pieces of cake.

 

Piece of Cake By The Ocean

Breaking a Cake By The Ocean block will drop 16 pieces of Cake By The Ocean. 

  • These pieces are stackable and edible.
  • Each piece restores 1 drumstick of hunger
  • The block will drop as many pieces as bites remaining to finish it.


PoI-5542 | The House

PoI-5542 is a Foundation point of interest, namely the “House” structure that appears in almost every biome of SCP-5542.

Inside this house, players can find various loot and uncover strange mysteries related to the Cake by the Ocean phenomenon, including addendum documents from the SCP detailing the mysterious inspection conducted by the Foundation.

The structure spawns only in the SCP-5542 biome at surface level, with approximately one structure per biome.

  

SCP-5542 Documents & SCP-5542 Label

The SCP-5542 document and SCP-5542 label are given to the player upon first entering the biome. 

The SCP-5542 addendum document can be found inside the PoI-5542 “House”.


The documents are readable, while the label provides information about the SCP’s classification and risk level.

  _● SCP Documents: _        [SCP-104 Document](https://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/scp-5542) ● You have permission to use this mod in your modpacks! _● Check out my other Mods:_ _[My CurseForge Profile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thecaptainfoxy/projects)_ _[My Modrinth Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/TheCaptainFoxy)_
